new_claims.claim_text: A hacker used ChatGPT and Claude to breach 9 Mexican government organizations, stealing hundreds of millions of private records.
new_claims.notes: Significant cybersecurity breach using AI tools. Impacts data privacy and national security.

updated_claims.notes: A US Navy blockade announced for the Strait of Hormuz implies restricted passage, but not necessarily a full closure. The impact on international shipping is significant.
Comments on the blockade post indicate gas prices are rising, but a direct causal link to the blockade and exceeding $4/gallon is not yet confirmed, though plausible.
